info.title: Platform Admin API
info.description: Generated from the platform admin resource contract. Do not edit this file manually; update resources/admin-resources.json and regenerate.

tags.name: sensitive-reveal
tags.description: Step-up verification and one-time sensitive field reveal endpoints.

tags.name: service-objects
tags.description: Versioned server-side QueryDefinition and CommandDefinition execution.

post.summary: Consume a grant and reveal one sensitive field value
post.description: Reveals one manifest-declared protected field. Authorization, purpose, factor policy and copy behavior come from the field x-platform-reveal contract.

get.summary: Get the step-up policy for one sensitive field
get.description: Reveals one manifest-declared protected field. Authorization, purpose, factor policy and copy behavior come from the field x-platform-reveal contract.

post.summary: Create a sensitive field reveal challenge
post.description: Reveals one manifest-declared protected field. Authorization, purpose, factor policy and copy behavior come from the field x-platform-reveal contract.

post.summary: Complete OIDC reauthentication for a sensitive field reveal challenge
post.description: Reveals one manifest-declared protected field. Authorization, purpose, factor policy and copy behavior come from the field x-platform-reveal contract.

post.summary: Start OIDC reauthentication for a sensitive field reveal challenge
post.description: Reveals one manifest-declared protected field. Authorization, purpose, factor policy and copy behavior come from the field x-platform-reveal contract.

post.summary: Complete SMS verification for a sensitive field reveal challenge
post.description: Reveals one manifest-declared protected field. Authorization, purpose, factor policy and copy behavior come from the field x-platform-reveal contract.

post.summary: Start SMS verification for a sensitive field reveal challenge
post.description: Reveals one manifest-declared protected field. Authorization, purpose, factor policy and copy behavior come from the field x-platform-reveal contract.

post.summary: Execute a versioned server-side persisted QueryDefinition

404.description: Service-object runtime unavailable or QueryDefinition not found

post.summary: Exchange Admin credentials or an identity provider transaction
Start an Admin identity provider transaction

Conflict.description: Request conflicts with the current reveal state

Gone.description: Reveal challenge, factor or grant expired

ServiceUnavailable.description: Sensitive reveal runtime or protected value unavailable

CustomOperationData.description: Custom handler response. Use the route metadata, resource schema and handler implementation as the source of truth until a resource-specific response contract is declared.

AdminQueryRequest.description: Structured query payload compiled from safe UI filters or SQL-like input. Field names must come from the resource schema whitelist; raw input must never be concatenated into SQL.

codeChallenge.description: PKCE S256 code challenge generated by the Admin client.
